title: Rotten Flesh To Leather
description: This is a very simple mod, it allows you to smelt rotten flesh into leather!
body:
## Description
This is a very simple mod, it allows you to turn rotten flesh into leather!
---
- XP granted when using a furnace: 0.35
- Ticks it takes when using a furnace: 200 (10 seconds)
---
- XP granted when using a smoker: 0.35
- Ticks it takes when using a smoker: 100 (5 seconds)
---
- XP granted when using a campfire: 0.84
- Ticks it takes when using a campfire: 600 (30 seconds)
---

(Only version 4.0.0+ allows for using a smoker/campfire in addition to the furnace.)
